_fields.AppDomain.AssemblyList: Pointer to the list of assemblies in the application domain
_fields.AppDomain.FriendlyName: Pointer to the application domain's friendly name
_fields.Array.m_NumComponents: Number of items in the array
_fields.Array.Size: Size of the fixed portion of an array object
_fields.ArrayListBase.Count: Total number of elements in the array list
_fields.ArrayListBase.FirstBlock: Pointer to the first array-list block
_fields.ArrayListBlock.ArrayStart: Pointer to the start of the block's element array
_fields.ArrayListBlock.Next: Pointer to the next array-list block
_fields.ArrayListBlock.Size: Number of elements available in the block
_fields.Assembly.Error: Pointer to the load exception, or null when no error occurred
_fields.Assembly.IsCollectible: Whether the assembly may be collected
_fields.Assembly.IsDynamic: Whether the assembly was created dynamically
_fields.Assembly.IsLoaded: Whether the assembly has finished loading
_fields.Assembly.Module: Pointer to the assembly's manifest module
_fields.Assembly.NotifyFlags: Debugger and profiler notification state for the assembly
_fields.AssemblyBinder.AssemblyLoadContext: Handle to the managed assembly load context
_fields.AsyncMethodData.Flags: Flags classifying the async method, including its calling convention, return shape, and whether it is a thunk
_fields.AsyncMethodData.Size: Size of the async method data, added when HasAsyncMethodData flag is set
_fields.AsyncResumeInfo.DiagnosticIP: Native IP into the resumed method used for diagnostics (may be null)
_fields.AuxiliarySymbolInfo.Address: Code pointer to the dynamically-located helper function
_fields.AuxiliarySymbolInfo.Name: Pointer to a null-terminated char string with the helper name
_fields.AuxiliarySymbolInfo.Size: Size in bytes of each entry in the auxiliary symbol array
_fields.Bucket.Size: Size of a hash map bucket in bytes
_fields.CardTableInfo.NextCardTable: Pointer to the next card table in the linked list
_fields.CardTableInfo.Recount: Reference count for the card table
_fields.CardTableInfo.Size: Total size of the bookkeeping allocation
_fields.CFinalize.FillPointers: Pointer to the start of an array containing "CFinalizeFillPointersLength" elements
_fields.CGrowableSymbolStream.Buffer: Pointer to the in-memory symbol stream buffer
_fields.CGrowableSymbolStream.Size: Size of the symbol stream buffer in bytes
_fields.CMiniMdRW.All4ByteColumns: Whether all variable-width columns are 4 bytes wide
_fields.CMiniMdRW.BlobHeap: Address of the blob heap's storage pool
_fields.CMiniMdRW.GuidHeap: Address of the GUID heap's storage pool
_fields.CMiniMdRW.StringHeap: Address of the string heap's storage pool
_fields.CMiniMdRW.Tables: Address of the first table's record storage pool
_fields.CMiniMdRW.UserStringHeap: Address of the user-string heap's storage pool
_fields.CMiniMdSchema.RecordCounts: Address of the inline per-table row count array
_fields.CodeHeap.HeapType: `uint8` discriminant identifying the concrete heap type
_fields.CodeHeapListNode.EndAddress: End address of the used portion of the code heap
_fields.CodeHeapListNode.HeaderMap: Bit array used to find the start of methods - relative to `MapBase`
_fields.CodeHeapListNode.Heap: Pointer to the `CodeHeap` object managed by this node
_fields.CodeHeapListNode.MapBase: Start of the map - start address rounded down based on OS page size
_fields.CodeHeapListNode.StartAddress: Start address of the used portion of the code heap
_fields.CodeRangeMapRangeList.RangeListType: Integer identifying the stub code block kind for this range list
_fields.ComCallWrapper.Handle: GC object handle (m_ppThis); dereference to get the managed object pointer
_fields.ComCallWrapper.IPtr: Base address of the COM interface pointer array
_fields.ComCallWrapper.Next: Next wrapper in the linked chain (all-bits-set sentinel = end of list)
_fields.ComInterfaceEntry.Size: Size in bytes of each user-defined COM interface entry
_fields.ComMethodTable.Flags: Flags word; bit 0x10 (LayoutComplete) must be set for valid vtable
_fields.ComMethodTable.MethodTable: Pointer to the managed MethodTable for this COM interface
_fields.ComMethodTable.Size: Size in bytes of the fixed ComMethodTable header immediately preceding its vtable
_fields.ContinuationObject.Next: Pointer to the next continuation in the linked list
_fields.ContinuationObject.ResumeInfo: Pointer to the `ResumeInfo` for this suspension point (may be null)
_fields.ContinuationObject.State: State index identifying the suspension point within the resumed method
_fields.CoreLibBinder.Classes: Pointer to the array of core library type handles indexed by CorElementType
_fields.CtxEntry.CtxCookie: Context cookie stored in the context entry; compared against the RCW's cookie to detect disconnection
_fields.CtxEntry.STAThread: STA thread pointer for the context entry
_fields.Debugger.Defines: Bitfield of compile-time debugger feature defines
_fields.Debugger.GCNotificationEventsEnabled: Whether GC notification events are enabled
_fields.Debugger.LeftSideInitialized: Whether the left-side debugger infrastructure is initialized
_fields.Debugger.RgHijackFunction: Pointer to the runtime's array of hijack-stub address ranges.
_fields.DebuggerEval.AssemblyPtr: Pointer to the Assembly the eval is rooted in
_fields.DebuggerEval.MethodToken: Metadata token of the method being evaluated
_fields.Delegate.ExtraData: Invocation count for multicast, UnmanagedMarker for unmanaged, MethodDesc otherwise
_fields.Delegate.HelperObject: Invocation list for multicast, MethodInfo otherwise
_fields.Delegate.InvocationCount: Invocation count (non-zero for multicast, wrapper, unmanaged, or special delegates)
_fields.DynamicHelperFrame.DynamicHelperFrameFla: Flags indicating which argument registers contain GC references
_fields.DynamicILBlobTable.EntryIL: Offset of the IL pointer within each dynamic IL table entry
_fields.DynamicILBlobTable.EntryMethodToken: Offset of the method token within each dynamic IL table entry
_fields.DynamicILBlobTable.Size: Size in bytes of each table entry
_fields.DynamicILBlobTable.TableSize: Number of entries in the table
_fields.DynamicMetadata.Data: Start of dynamic metadata data array
_fields.DynamicMetadata.Size: Size of the dynamic metadata blob (as a 32bit uint)
_fields.DynamicMethodDesc.MethodName: Pointer to Null-terminated UTF8 string describing the Method desc
_fields.EEAllocContext.GCAllocationContext: Embedded GC allocation context for the thread
_fields.EEClass.BaseSizePadding: Trailing padding included in MethodTable.BaseSize but not occupied by instance fields
_fields.EEClass.FieldDescList: A list of fields in the type
_fields.EEClass.InternalCorElementType: An InternalCorElementType uses the enum values of a CorElementType to indicate some of the information about the type of the type which uses the EEClass In particular, all reference types are CorElementType.Class, Enums are the element type of their underlying type and ValueTypes which can exactly be represented as an element type are represented as such, all other values types are represented as CorElementType.ValueType.
_fields.EEClass.MethodDescChunk: Pointer to the first MethodDescChunk of the EEClass
_fields.EEClass.MethodTable: Pointer to the canonical MethodTable of this type
_fields.EEClass.NumInstanceFields: Count of instance fields of the EEClass
_fields.EEClass.NumMethods: Count of methods attached to the EEClass
_fields.EEClass.NumNonVirtualSlots: Count of non-virtual slots for the EEClass
_fields.EEClass.NumStaticFields: Count of static fields of the EEClass
_fields.EEClass.NumThreadStaticFields: Count of threadstatic fields of the EEClass
_fields.EEClass.OptionalFields: Pointer to the `EEClassOptionalFields` for this type, or null if it has none
_fields.EEClassOptionalFields.EightByteRegisters: Inline `SystemVEightByteRegistersInfo` describing the SystemV AMD64 register-passing classification (only populated on UNIX_AMD64_ABI builds)
_fields.EEConfig.ModifiableAssemblies: Edit and Continue configuration represented by `ClrModifiableAssemblies`
_fields.EEExceptionClause.HandlerEndPC: Native offset of the end of the handler
_fields.EEExceptionClause.HandlerStartPC: Native offset of the start of the handler
_fields.EEExceptionClause.Size: Size of an exception clause in bytes
_fields.EEExceptionClause.TryEndPC: Native offset of the end of the try block
_fields.EEExceptionClause.TryStartPC: Native offset of the start of the try block
_fields.EEExceptionClause.TypeHandle: Union field: TypeHandle (cached), ClassToken, or FilterOffset
_fields.EEILException.Clauses: Start address of the inline array of `EE_ILEXCEPTION_CLAUSE` entries
_fields.EEJitManager.AllCodeHeaps: Pointer to the head of the linked list of all code heaps managed by the EEJitManager.
_fields.EEJitManager.StoreRichDebugInfo: Boolean value determining if debug info associated with the JitManager contains rich info.
_fields.EETypeHashTable.Buckets: Pointer to the hash table buckets
_fields.EETypeHashTable.Count: Number of elements in the hash table
_fields.EETypeHashTable.VolatileEntryNextEntry: Offset of the next-entry pointer within a hash table entry
_fields.EETypeHashTable.VolatileEntryValue: Offset of the value within a hash table entry
_fields.EnCAddedField.FieldData: The dependent-handle pair (typed as ObjectHandle) whose primary OBJECTREF is the dependency anchor and whose secondary OBJECTREF is the System.Diagnostics.EditAndContinueHelper instance.
_fields.EnCAddedField.FieldDesc: Pointer to the EnCFieldDesc for the added instance field.
_fields.EnCAddedField.Next: Pointer to the next EnCAddedField entry in the per-object linked list hanging off the SyncBlock.
_fields.EnCAddedFieldElement.FieldDesc: Address of the embedded EnCFieldDesc (layout-compatible with FieldDesc).
_fields.EnCAddedFieldElement.Next: Pointer to the next EnCAddedFieldElement in the linked list.
_fields.EnCAddedStaticField.FieldData: Address of the first byte of static field storage on this entry.
_fields.EnCEEClassData.AddedInstanceFields: Head of the linked list of EnCAddedFieldElement for added instance fields.
_fields.EnCEEClassData.AddedStaticFields: Head of the linked list of EnCAddedFieldElement for added static fields.
_fields.EnCEEClassData.MethodTable: Pointer to the MethodTable whose EnC data is held by this entry.
_fields.EnCFieldDesc.NeedsFixup: Non-zero when the EnCFieldDesc still needs fixup (i.e., it has not been fully initialized).
_fields.EnCFieldDesc.StaticFieldData: Pointer to the EnCAddedStaticField that backs this static field (NULL until storage has been allocated).
_fields.EnCSyncBlockInfo.List: Head of the linked list of EnCAddedField entries for the EnC-added instance fields associated with an object.
_fields.Exception._stackTrace: Either an I1Array of StackTraceElement entries or a combined object[] whose slot 0 is that I1Array
_fields.Exception._xcode: Native exception code captured at throw
_fields.ExceptionInfo.CallerOfActualHandlerFrame: Stack frame of the caller of the catch handler
_fields.ExceptionInfo.ClauseForCatchHandlerEndPC: End PC offset of the catch handler clause, used for interruptible offset override
_fields.ExceptionInfo.ClauseForCatchHandlerStart: Start PC offset of the catch handler clause, used for interruptible offset override
_fields.ExceptionInfo.ContextRecord: Pointer to the OS `CONTEXT` the OS dispatcher pushed for this exception
_fields.ExceptionInfo.CSFEHClause: Caller stack frame of the current EH clause
_fields.ExceptionInfo.CSFEnclosingClause: Caller stack frame of the enclosing clause
_fields.ExceptionInfo.ExceptionRecord: Pointer to the OS `EXCEPTION_RECORD` the OS dispatcher pushed for this exception
_fields.ExceptionInfo.ExceptionWatsonBucketTrack: Pointer to Watson unhandled buckets on non-Unix
_fields.ExceptionInfo.PreviousNestedInfo: Pointer to previous nested exception info
_fields.ExceptionInfo.StackHighBound: High bound of the stack range unwound by this exception
_fields.ExceptionInfo.StackLowBound: Low bound of the stack range unwound by this exception
_fields.ExceptionInfo.ThrownObject: Handle to the thrown exception object
_fields.ExceptionLookupTableEntry.ExceptionInfoR: RVA of the exception clause data
_fields.ExceptionLookupTableEntry.Size: Size of an exception lookup table entry in bytes
_fields.ExternalMethodFrame.Indirection: Import slot pointer for GCRefMap resolution via FindReadyToRunModule
_fields.FieldDesc.DWord2: Packed flags and offset word containing the field's offset; the FieldOffsetNewEnc sentinel identifies an EnC-added field without assigned storage
_fields.FieldDesc.MTOfEnclosingClass: Pointer to method table of enclosing class
_fields.FieldDesc.Size: Size in bytes of each FieldDesc entry in a type's field descriptor list
_fields.FixupPrecodeData.MethodDesc: pointer to the MethodDesc associated with this fixup precode
_fields.FnPtrTypeDesc.CallConv: Lower 8 bits is the calling convention bit as extracted by the signature that defines this TypeDesc
_fields.FnPtrTypeDesc.LoaderModule: Loader module associated with the function-pointer type
_fields.FnPtrTypeDesc.NumArgs: Number of arguments to the function described by the TypeDesc
_fields.FnPtrTypeDesc.RetAndArgTypes: Pointer to an array of TypeHandle addresses. This length of this is 1 more than NumArgs
_fields.Frame.Next: Pointer to next from on linked list
_fields.FuncEvalFrame.DebuggerEvalPtr: Pointer to the Frame's DebuggerEval object
_fields.GCAllocContext.AllocBytes: Number of bytes allocated on SOH by this context
_fields.GCAllocContext.AllocBytesLoh: Number of bytes allocated not on SOH by this context
_fields.GCCoverageInfo.SavedCode: Pointer to the GCCover saved code copy, if supported
_fields.GCFrame.GCFlags: GC_CALL_* promotion flags applied when reporting the protected slots
_fields.GCFrame.Next: Pointer to the next GCFrame toward the top of the chain
_fields.GCFrame.NumObjRefs: Count of protected object reference slots starting at ObjRefs
_fields.GCFrame.ObjRefs: Pointer to the array of protected object reference slots
_fields.GCHeap.AllocAllocated: Heap's highest address allocated by Alloc (in sever builds)
_fields.GCHeap.BackgroundMaxSavedAddr: Heap's background saved highest address (only in server builds with background GC)
_fields.GCHeap.BackgroundMinSavedAddr: Heap's background saved lowest address (only in server builds with background GC)
_fields.GCHeap.CardTable: Pointer to the heap's bookkeeping GC data structure (in sever builds)
_fields.GCHeap.CompactReasons: Data array stored per heap (in sever builds)
_fields.GCHeap.EphemeralHeapSegment: Pointer to the heap's ephemeral heap segment (in sever builds)
_fields.GCHeap.ExpandMechanisms: Data array stored per heap (in sever builds)
_fields.GCHeap.FinalizeQueue: Pointer to the heap's CFinalize data structure (in sever builds)
_fields.GCHeap.FreeableSohSegment: Head of the freeable SOH segment linked list (server builds, background GC)
_fields.GCHeap.FreeableUohSegment: Head of the freeable UOH segment linked list (server builds, background GC)
_fields.GCHeap.FreeRegions: Start of the per-heap free region list array (server builds, region GC)
_fields.GCHeap.GenerationTable: Pointer to the start of an array containing "TotalGenerationCount" Generation structures (in sever builds)
_fields.GCHeap.HeapAnalyzeSuccess: Boolean indicating if heap analyze succeeded (in sever builds)
_fields.GCHeap.InterestingData: Data array stored per heap (in sever builds)
_fields.GCHeap.InterestingMechanismBits: Data array stored per heap (in sever builds)
_fields.GCHeap.InternalRootArray: Data array stored per heap (in sever builds)
_fields.GCHeap.MarkArray: Pointer to the heap's MarkArray (only in server builds with background GC)
_fields.GCHeap.NextSweepObj: Pointer to the heap's NextSweepObj (only in server builds with background GC)
_fields.GCHeap.OomData: OOM related data in a struct (in sever builds)
_fields.GCHeap.SavedSweepEphemeralSeg: Pointer to the heap's saved sweep ephemeral segment (only in server builds with segment and background GC)
_fields.GCHeap.SavedSweepEphemeralStart: Start of the heap's sweep ephemeral segment (only in server builds with segment and background GC)
_fields.Generation.Size: Size in bytes of each entry in the GC generation table
_fields.Generation.StartSegment: Pointer to the start heap segment
_fields.GenericsDictInfo.NumDicts: Number of instantiation dictionaries, including inherited ones, in this GenericsDictInfo
_fields.GenericsDictInfo.NumTypeArgs: Number of type arguments in the type or method instantiation described by this GenericsDictInfo
_fields.HandleTable.SegmentList: Head of linked list of handle table segments
_fields.HandleTableMap.BucketsPtr: Pointer to the bucket pointer array
_fields.HandleTableMap.Next: Pointer to the next handle table map in the linked list
_fields.HashMap.Buckets: Pointer to the buckets of a `HashMap`
_fields.HeapSegment.Allocated: Pointer to the allocated memory in the heap segment
_fields.HeapSegment.BackgroundAllocated: Pointer to the background allocated memory in the heap segment
_fields.HeapSegment.Committed: Pointer to the committed memory in the heap segment
_fields.HeapSegment.Flags: Flags indicating the heap segment properties
_fields.HeapSegment.Heap: Pointer to the heap that owns this segment (only in server builds)
_fields.HeapSegment.Mem: Pointer to the start of the heap segment memory
_fields.HeapSegment.Next: Pointer to the next heap segment
_fields.HeapSegment.Reserved: Pointer to the reserved memory in the heap segment
_fields.HeapSegment.Used: Pointer to the used memory in the heap segment
_fields.HijackArgs.CalleeSavedRegisters: Address of the embedded nonvolatile-register values saved for the hijacked thread
_fields.HijackArgs.Rsp: Stack pointer saved when the thread was hijacked on Windows x64
_fields.HijackArgs.Size: Size in bytes of the platform-specific hijack argument save area
_fields.HijackFrame.HijackArgsPtr: Pointer to the Frame's stored HijackArgs
_fields.HostCodeHeap.BaseAddress: Pointer to the base of the committed memory region
_fields.HostCodeHeap.CurrentAddress: Pointer to the last available committed byte in the region
_fields.IdDispenser.IdToThread: Array mapping small thread IDs to thread pointers
_fields.ILCodeVersioningState.ActiveVersionKind: an ILCodeVersionKind value indicating which fields of the active version are value
_fields.ILCodeVersioningState.ActiveVersionMetho: if the active version is synthetic or unknown, the MethodDef token for the method
_fields.ILCodeVersioningState.ActiveVersionModul: if the active version is synthetic or unknown, the pointer to the Module that defines the method
_fields.ILCodeVersioningState.ActiveVersionNode: if the active version is explicit, the NativeCodeVersionNode for the active version
_fields.ILCodeVersionNode.Deoptimized: whether this IL code version has been deoptimized
_fields.ILCodeVersionNode.ILAddress: Address of IL corresponding to ILCodeVersionNode
_fields.ILCodeVersionNode.InstrumentedILMap: Embedded InstrumentedILOffsetMapping describing the instrumented IL offset mapping
_fields.ILCodeVersionNode.VersionId: ReJIT ID of the IL code version node
_fields.ImageDataDirectory.VirtualAddress: Virtual address of the image data directory
_fields.ImageDosHeader.Lfanew: File offset of the PE signature and NT headers
_fields.ImageFileHeader.NumberOfSections: Number of section headers in the image
_fields.ImageFileHeader.SizeOfOptionalHeader: Size of the optional header in bytes
_fields.ImageOptionalHeader.SizeOfImage: Total size of the loaded image in bytes
_fields.ImageSectionHeader.PointerToRawData: File offset of the section's raw data
_fields.ImageSectionHeader.SizeOfRawData: Size of the section's raw data in the file
_fields.ImageSectionHeader.VirtualAddress: Relative virtual address of the section
_fields.InFlightTLSData.Next: Pointer to next in-flight TLS data entry
_fields.InFlightTLSData.TLSData: Object handle to the TLS data for the static field
_fields.InFlightTLSData.TlsIndex: TLS index for the in-flight static field
_fields.InlinedCallFrame.Datum: MethodDesc ptr or on 64 bit host: CALLI target address (if lowest bit is set) or on windows x86 host: argument stack size (if value is <64k)
_fields.InlinedCallFrame.Size: Size in bytes of the frame; a reportable MethodDesc pointer may immediately follow it
_fields.InlinedCallFrame.SPAfterProlog: Stack pointer after the managed method prolog, used to unwind frames with stack allocation
_fields.InstantiatedMethodDesc.NumGenericArgs: How many generic args the method has
_fields.InstantiatedMethodDesc.PerInstInfo: The pointer to the method's type arguments
_fields.InstMethodHashTable.Buckets: Pointer to the hash table buckets
_fields.InstMethodHashTable.Count: Number of elements in the hash table
_fields.InstMethodHashTable.VolatileEntryNextEnt: Offset of the next-entry pointer within a hash table entry
_fields.InstMethodHashTable.VolatileEntryValue: Offset of the value within a hash table entry
_fields.InstrumentedILOffsetMapping.Count: Number of instrumented IL offset map entries
_fields.InstrumentedILOffsetMapping.Map: Pointer to the array of instrumented IL offset map entries
_fields.InterfaceEntry.MethodTable: MethodTable pointer for the cached COM interface
_fields.InterfaceEntry.Size: Size in bytes of each entry in an RCW's inline interface cache
_fields.InterfaceEntry.Unknown: IUnknown* pointer for the cached COM interface
_fields.InternalComInterfaceDispatch.Entries: Start of vtable entry pointers within the dispatch block
_fields.InternalComInterfaceDispatch.Size: Size in bytes of each dispatch block; used to determine the number of vtable entries per block
_fields.InteropSyncBlockInfo.CCF: COM class factory pointer; sentinel value 0x1 means previously had a CCF (treat as null)
_fields.InteropSyncBlockInfo.CCW: CCW pointer; sentinel value 0x1 means previously had a CCW (treat as null)
_fields.InteropSyncBlockInfo.RCW: RCW pointer; bit 0 is a lock bit and must be masked off
_fields.InterpByteCodeStart.Method: pointer to the InterpMethod associated with the bytecode
_fields.InterpMethod.MethodDesc: pointer to the MethodDesc for the interpreted method
_fields.InterpMethodContextFrame.Ip: The actual instruction pointer within the method (null if frame is inactive/reusable)
_fields.InterpMethodContextFrame.NextPtr: Pointer to the next InterpMethodContextFrame toward the top of the stack
_fields.InterpMethodContextFrame.ParentPtr: Pointer to the parent InterpMethodContextFrame in the call chain (null for outermost frame)
_fields.InterpMethodContextFrame.Stack: Pointer to the stack base for this interpreted method, used as the frame pointer when interpreter GC info uses a stack-base register
_fields.InterpreterFrame.IsFaulting: Boolean indicating whether the topmost interpreted frame has thrown an exception. When set, the context for the top interpreted frame must include CONTEXT_EXCEPTION_ACTIVE so exception unwinders treat the IP as a faulting instruction rather than a return-from-call
_fields.InterpreterFrame.TopInterpMethodContextF: Pointer to the InterpreterFrame's top InterpMethodContextFrame
_fields.InterpreterPrecodeData.ByteCodeAddr: pointer to the InterpByteCodeStart for the interpreter bytecode (Version 3 only)
_fields.InterpreterRealCodeHeader.DebugInfo: Pointer to the DebugInfo for interpreter code
_fields.InterpreterRealCodeHeader.GCInfo: Pointer to the GCInfo encoding for interpreter code
_fields.InterpreterRealCodeHeader.JitEHInfo: Pointer to the `EE_ILEXCEPTION` containing exception clauses for interpreter code
_fields.InterpreterRealCodeHeader.MethodDesc: Pointer to the corresponding `MethodDesc` for interpreter code
_fields.JITNotification.Size: Size in bytes of each entry in the JIT notification table
_fields.LoaderAllocator.CreationNumber: Monotonically-increasing creation number assigned to each collectible LoaderAllocator.
_fields.LoaderAllocator.DynamicHelpersStubHeap: Dynamic-helper stub heap (optional, present when ReadyToRun dynamic-helper stubs are enabled)
_fields.LoaderAllocator.FixupPrecodeHeap: Fixup-precode heap (optional, present when fixup precodes are supported)
_fields.LoaderAllocator.IsCollectible: Non-zero if the LoaderAllocator is collectible.
_fields.LoaderAllocator.NewStubPrecodeHeap: New-stub-precode heap (optional, absent with portable entry points)
_fields.LoaderAllocator.ObjectHandle: Handle to the managed loader allocator object
_fields.LoaderAllocator.ReferenceCount: Reference count of the loader allocator
_fields.LoaderAllocator.VirtualCallStubManager: Pointer to the virtual-call stub manager
_fields.LoaderCodeHeap.LoaderHeap: Offset of the embedded `ExplicitControlLoaderHeap` within the `LoaderCodeHeap` object; adding this to the object's base address yields the loader heap address
_fields.LoaderHeap.FirstBlock: Pointer to the first loader-heap block
_fields.LoaderHeapBlock.Next: Pointer to the next loader-heap block
_fields.LoaderHeapBlock.VirtualAddress: Start address of the reserved virtual memory
_fields.LoaderHeapBlock.VirtualSize: Size of the reserved virtual memory region in bytes
_fields.ManagedObjectWrapperLayout.Dispatches: Pointer to the dispatch section (InternalComInterfaceDispatch array)
_fields.ManagedObjectWrapperLayout.RefCount: Reference count of the managed object wrapper
_fields.ManagedObjectWrapperLayout.UserDefinedCo: Number of user-defined COM interface entries
_fields.MDInternalRW.Stgdb: Pointer to the read-write storage database
_fields.MemoryRange.Size: Size of the range in bytes; the range covers [StartAddress, StartAddress + Size)
_fields.MemoryRange.StartAddress: Inclusive start address of the range
_fields.MethodDesc.ChunkIndex: Offset of this MethodDesc relative to the end of its containing MethodDescChunk - in multiples of MethodDescAlignment
_fields.MethodDesc.CodeData: Pointer to per-method code data containing entry-point and code-versioning state
_fields.MethodDesc.EntryPointFlags: Flags describing entry-point state, including whether a temporary entry point has been assigned
_fields.MethodDesc.Flags3AndTokenRemainder: More flags for the method, and the low bits of the method's token's RID
_fields.MethodDesc.GCCoverageInfo: The method's GCCover debug info, if supported
_fields.MethodDescChunk.Count: The number of MethodDesc entries in this chunk, minus 1.
_fields.MethodDescChunk.FlagsAndTokenRange: MethodDescChunk flags, and the upper bits of the method token's RID
_fields.MethodDescChunk.MethodTable: The method table set of methods belongs to
_fields.MethodDescChunk.Size: The size of this MethodDescChunk  following this MethodDescChunk header, minus 1. In multiples of MethodDescAlignment
_fields.MethodDescCodeData.OptimizationTier: Optimization tier of the method's current native code
_fields.MethodDescCodeData.TemporaryEntryPoint: Temporary code entry point used before the method has a stable entry point
_fields.MethodDescCodeData.VersioningState: The IL versioning state associated with a method descriptor
_fields.MethodDescVersioningState.NativeCodeVers: code version node of this method desc, if active
_fields.MethodImpl.Size: Size of the MethodImpl data, added when HasMethodImpl flag is set
_fields.MethodTable.AuxiliaryData: Pointer to the AuxiliaryData of a method table
_fields.MethodTable.EEClassOrCanonMT: Path to both EEClass and canonical MethodTable of a MethodTable
_fields.MethodTable.MTFlags: One of the flags fields on MethodTable
_fields.MethodTable.MTFlags2: One of the flags fields on MethodTable
_fields.MethodTable.NumVirtuals: Number of virtual methods in MethodTable
_fields.MethodTable.PerInstInfo: Either the array element type, or pointer to generic information for MethodTable
_fields.MethodTable.Size: Size in bytes of the fixed MethodTable structure before its vtable indirections
_fields.MethodTableAuxiliaryData.LoaderModule: The loader module associated with a method table
_fields.MethodTableAuxiliaryData.OffsetToNonVirt: Offset from the auxiliary data address to the array of non-virtual slots
_fields.Module.AvailableTypeParams: Pointer to the available type-parameter hash table
_fields.Module.Base: Base address of the module's loaded image
_fields.Module.DynamicILBlobTable: Pointer to the table of dynamically supplied IL bodies
_fields.Module.DynamicMetadata: Pointer to metadata updated dynamically through Edit and Continue
_fields.Module.EnCClassList: Pointer to the list of classes added through Edit and Continue
_fields.Module.FieldDefToDescMap: Pointer to the field-definition-to-field-descriptor lookup map
_fields.Module.FileName: Pointer to the null-terminated UTF-16 module file name
_fields.Module.GrowableSymbolStream: Pointer to the in-memory symbol stream
_fields.Module.InstMethodHashTable: Pointer to the instantiated-method hash table
_fields.Module.LoaderAllocator: Pointer to the module's loader allocator
_fields.Module.ManifestModuleReferencesMap: Pointer to the manifest-module-reference lookup map
_fields.Module.MemberRefToDescMap: Pointer to the member-reference-to-descriptor lookup map
_fields.Module.MetadataGeneration: Counter incremented each time a module's metadata changes
_fields.Module.MethodDefToDescMap: Pointer to the method-definition-to-method-descriptor lookup map
_fields.Module.Path: Pointer to the null-terminated UTF-16 module path
_fields.Module.PEAssembly: Pointer to the module's PE assembly
_fields.Module.ReadyToRunInfo: Pointer to the module's ReadyToRun information
_fields.Module.SimpleName: Pointer to the null-terminated UTF-8 module name
_fields.Module.TypeDefToMethodTableMap: Pointer to the type-definition-to-method-table lookup map
_fields.Module.TypeRefToMethodTableMap: Pointer to the type-reference-to-method-table lookup map
_fields.ModuleLookupMap.Count: Number of pointer-sized entries in this map segment
_fields.ModuleLookupMap.Next: Pointer to the next segment of the lookup map
_fields.ModuleLookupMap.SupportedFlagsMask: Mask of flag bits supported on lookup-map entries
_fields.ModuleLookupMap.TableData: Pointer to the first lookup-map entry
_fields.NativeCodeSlot.Size: Size of the native code slot, added when HasNativeCodeSlot flag is set
_fields.NativeCodeVersionNode.ILVersionId: ReJIT ID of the IL code version that is the parent of this native code version
_fields.NativeCodeVersionNode.MethodDesc: indicates a synthetic native code version node
_fields.NativeCodeVersionNode.NativeCode: indicates an explicit native code version node
_fields.NativeCodeVersionNode.Next: pointer to the next native code version
_fields.NativeCodeVersionNode.OptimizationTier: The optimization tier of this native code version
_fields.NativeObjectWrapperObject.ExternalComObj: Address of the external COM object
_fields.NonVtableSlot.Size: Size of the non-vtable slot, added when HasNonVtableSlot flag is set
_fields.Object.Size: Size in bytes of the fixed Object portion through its MethodTable pointer
_fields.ObjectHeader.SyncBlockValue: Sync block value from the object header
_fields.OomHistory.Allocated: Pointer to allocated memory at time of OOM
_fields.OomHistory.AllocSize: Size of the allocation that caused the OOM
_fields.OomHistory.AvailablePagefileMb: Available pagefile size in MB at time of OOM
_fields.OomHistory.GcIndex: GC index when the OOM occurred
_fields.OomHistory.LohP: Large object heap flag indicating if OOM was related to LOH
_fields.OomHistory.Reason: Reason code for the out-of-memory condition
_fields.OomHistory.Reserved: Pointer to reserved memory at time of OOM
_fields.OomHistory.Size: Size value related to the OOM condition
_fields.PatchpointInfo.LocalCount: Number of locals in the method associated with the patchpoint.
_fields.PatchpointInfo.Size: Size in bytes of the fixed patchpoint header before its variable local-offset data
_fields.PEAssembly.MDImport: An `MDInternalRW` when module has writable metadata
_fields.PEImage.FlatImageLayout: Pointer to the PEImage's flat PEImageLayout (used when there is no loaded layout, e.g. webcil images)
_fields.PEImage.LoadedImageLayout: Pointer to the loaded image layout
_fields.PEImage.ProbeExtensionResult: Result of probing the image file extension
_fields.PEImageLayout.Base: Base address of the image layout
_fields.PEImageLayout.Size: Size of the image layout in bytes
_fields.PInvokeCalliFrame.VASigCookiePtr: Pointer to the varargs signature cookie for the unmanaged call
_fields.PlatformMetadata.CodePointerFlags: fields describing the behavior of target code pointers
_fields.PortableEntryPoint.MethodDesc: Method desc of portable entrypoint (only defined if `FeaturePortableEntrypoints` is enabled)
_fields.PrecodeMachineDescriptor.FixupBytes: Assembly code of a FixupStub (Version 3 only)
_fields.PrecodeMachineDescriptor.FixupIgnoredByt: Bytes to ignore of when comparing FixupBytes to an actual block of memory in the target process. (Version 3 only)
_fields.PrecodeMachineDescriptor.FixupPrecodeTyp: Precode type byte for a fixup precode
_fields.PrecodeMachineDescriptor.FixupStubPrecod: Byte size of FixupBytes and FixupIgnoredBytes (Version 3 only)
_fields.PrecodeMachineDescriptor.DynamicHelperPr: Precode type byte for a dynamic helper precode
_fields.PrecodeMachineDescriptor.InterpreterPrec: Precode type byte for an interpreter precode
_fields.PrecodeMachineDescriptor.PInvokeImportPr: Precode type byte for a P/Invoke import precode
_fields.PrecodeMachineDescriptor.StubBytes: Assembly code of a StubPrecode (Version 3 only)
_fields.PrecodeMachineDescriptor.StubCodePageSiz: Size of a precode code page (in bytes)
_fields.PrecodeMachineDescriptor.StubIgnoredByte: Bytes to ignore of when comparing StubBytes to an actual block of memory in the target process. (Version 3 only)
_fields.PrecodeMachineDescriptor.StubPrecodeSize: Byte size of StubBytes and StubIgnoredBytes (Version 3 only)
_fields.PrecodeMachineDescriptor.StubPrecodeType: precode sort byte for stub precodes
_fields.PrecodeMachineDescriptor.ThisPointerRetB: Precode type byte for a this-pointer return-buffer precode
_fields.PrecodeMachineDescriptor.UMEntryPrecodeT: Precode type byte for a UMEntry precode
_fields.ProfControlBlock.RejitOnAttachEnabled: cached value of the ProfAPI_RejitOnAttach configuration knob
_fields.R2RExceptionClause.HandlerEndPC: Native offset of the end of the handler
_fields.R2RExceptionClause.HandlerStartPC: Native offset of the start of the handler
_fields.R2RExceptionClause.Size: Size of a ReadyToRun exception clause in bytes
_fields.R2RExceptionClause.TryEndPC: Native offset of the end of the try block
_fields.R2RExceptionClause.TryStartPC: Native offset of the start of the try block
_fields.RangeSection.NextForDelete: Pointer to next range section for deletion
_fields.RangeSection.RangeBegin: Begin address of the range section
_fields.RangeSection.RangeList: Pointer to the `CodeRangeMapRangeList` associated with this range section
_fields.RangeSectionFragment.Next: Tagged pointer to the next fragment (bit 0 is the collectible flag; must be stripped to obtain the address)
_fields.RCW.CreatorThread: Pointer to the thread that created this RCW
_fields.RCW.CtxCookie: COM context cookie for the RCW
_fields.RCW.CtxEntry: Pointer to CtxEntry (bit 0 is a synchronization flag; must be masked off before use)
_fields.RCW.Flags: Combined flags DWORD (contains marshaling type, aggregation, and containment bits)
_fields.RCW.IdentityPointer: Identity IUnknown* used to identify the underlying COM object
_fields.RCW.InterfaceEntries: Offset of the inline interface entry cache array within the RCW struct
_fields.RCW.NextCleanupBucket: Next bucket in the cleanup list
_fields.RCW.NextRCW: Next RCW in the same bucket
_fields.RCW.RefCount: Reference count of the RCW wrapper
_fields.RCW.SyncBlockIndex: Index into the sync block table; used to resolve the managed object (0 = no managed object)
_fields.RCW.UnknownPointer: Primary IUnknown* pointer for the RCW; a sentinel value indicates disconnection
_fields.RCW.VTablePtr: Vtable pointer of the COM object
_fields.RCWCleanupList.FirstBucket: Head of the bucket linked list
_fields.ReadyToRunCoreHeader.NumberOfSections: Number of sections following the header
_fields.ReadyToRunCoreHeader.Size: Size of the ReadyToRun core header in bytes
_fields.ReadyToRunInfo.Composite: Pointer to the `ReadyToRunCoreInfo` used for section lookup
_fields.ReadyToRunInfo.CompositeInfo: Pointer to composite R2R info - or itself for non-composite
_fields.ReadyToRunInfo.DebugInfoSection: Pointer to an `ImageDataDirectory` for the debug info
_fields.ReadyToRunInfo.DelayLoadMethodCallThunks: Pointer to an `ImageDataDirectory` for the delay load method call thunks
_fields.ReadyToRunInfo.EntryPointToMethodDescMap: `HashMap` of entry point addresses to `MethodDesc` pointers
_fields.ReadyToRunInfo.HotColdMap: Pointer to an array of 32-bit integers - [see R2R format](../coreclr/botr/readytorun-format.md#readytorunsectiontypehotcoldmap-v80)
_fields.ReadyToRunInfo.ImportSections: Pointer to the array of ReadyToRun import sections
_fields.ReadyToRunInfo.LoadedImageBase: Base address of the loaded R2R image
_fields.ReadyToRunInfo.RuntimeFunctions: Pointer to an array of `RuntimeFunctions` - [see R2R format](../coreclr/botr/readytorun-format.md#readytorunsectiontyperuntimefunctions)
_fields.ReadyToRunSection.Size: Size of a ReadyToRun section entry in bytes
_fields.RealCodeHeader.EHInfo: Pointer to the `EE_ILEXCEPTION` containing exception clauses
_fields.RegionFreeList.HeadFreeRegion: Head of the free region segment list
_fields.RegionFreeList.Size: Size in bytes of each region free-list structure
_fields.ResumableFrame.TargetContextPtr: Pointer to the Frame's Target Context
_fields.RuntimeFunction.BeginAddress: Begin address of the function. On ARM32, bit 0 (the Thumb bit) is set.
_fields.RuntimeFunction.EndAddress: End address of the function. Only exists on some platforms
_fields.RuntimeFunction.Size: Size of a runtime function entry in bytes
_fields.RuntimeFunction.UnwindData: Pointer to the unwind info for the function
_fields.RuntimeThreadLocals.AllocContext: GC allocation context for the thread
_fields.Signature.SignatureLength: Length in bytes of the raw signature blob.
_fields.Signature.SignaturePointer: Target address of the raw signature blob.
_fields.SimpleComCallWrapper.Flags: Bit flags for wrapper properties (aggregated, extends-COM, handle-weak, etc.)
_fields.SimpleComCallWrapper.MainWrapper: Pointer back to the first (start) ComCallWrapper in the chain
_fields.SimpleComCallWrapper.OuterIUnknown: Outer IUnknown pointer for aggregated CCWs (m_pOuter)
_fields.SimpleComCallWrapper.RefCount: The wrapper refcount value (includes CLEANUP_SENTINEL bit)
_fields.SimpleComCallWrapper.VTablePtr: Base address of the standard interface vtable pointer array (used for SCCW IP resolution)
_fields.StackTraceArrayHeader.Size: Number of StackTraceElement entries that follow this header in the I1Array payload
_fields.StackTraceElement.Ip: Captured native instruction pointer for the frame
_fields.StackTraceElement.MethodDesc: Pointer to the frame method's MethodDesc
_fields.StackTraceElement.Size: Size in bytes of each element in the exception stack trace array
_fields.StgPool.DataSize: Live byte count of the head segment
_fields.StgPool.NextSegment: Pointer to the next pool segment
_fields.StgPool.SegData: Pointer to the head segment's data
_fields.StgPoolSeg.DataSize: Live byte count of this extension segment
_fields.StgPoolSeg.NextSegment: Pointer to the next pool segment, or null
_fields.StgPoolSeg.SegData: Pointer to this extension segment's data
_fields.StoredSigMethodDesc.cSig: Count of bytes in the metadata signature
_fields.StressLog.LoggedFacilities: Bitmask of facilities that are logged
_fields.StressLog.MaxSizePerThread: Maximum size of the log per thread
_fields.StressLog.ModuleOffset: Offset of the module in the stress log
_fields.StressLog.Modules: Offset of the stress log's module table (if StressLogHasModuleTable is 1)
_fields.StressLog.StartTime: Wall-clock time when the stress log was started (FILETIME, 100ns units since Jan 1 1601)
_fields.StressLog.StartTimestamp: Timestamp when the stress log was started
_fields.StressLog.TickFrequency: Number of ticks per second for stresslog timestamps
_fields.StressLog.TotalChunks: Total number of chunks across all thread-specific logs
_fields.StressLogChunk.Buf: The data stored in the chunk
_fields.StressLogChunk.Sig1: First byte of the chunk signature (to ensure validity)
_fields.StressLogChunk.Sig2: Second byte of the chunk signature (to ensure validity)
_fields.StressLogChunk.Size: Size in bytes of each stress log chunk
_fields.StressLogMemory.Chunks: Collection of all chunk addresses reached by walking the thread stress logs
_fields.StressMsg.Args: The arguments of the message (number of arguments specified in the header)
_fields.StressMsgHeader.Size: Size in bytes of the fixed stress message header before its arguments
_fields.String.m_FirstChar: Address of the first UTF-16 character in the string
_fields.String.m_StringLength: Length of the string in UTF-16 characters
_fields.StubDispatchFrame.Indirection: Import slot pointer for GCRefMap resolution via FindReadyToRunModule
_fields.StubDispatchFrame.RepresentativeMTPtr: Pointer to Frame's method table pointer
_fields.StubPrecodeData.MethodDesc: pointer to the MethodDesc associated with this stub precode (Version 1 only)
_fields.StubPrecodeData.SecretParam: pointer to the MethodDesc associated with this stub precode or a second stub data pointer for other types (Version 2 only)
_fields.SyncBlock.EnCInfo: Pointer to Edit-and-Continue added-field information for the object; optional when Edit and Continue is not configured
_fields.SyncBlock.HashCode: Hash code stored in the sync block
_fields.SyncBlock.InteropInfo: Pointer to optional COM interop data associated with the sync block
_fields.SyncBlock.LinkNext: Head pointer for cleanup list link
_fields.SyncBlock.Lock: Object handle referring to the System.Threading.Lock used for the object's monitor
_fields.SyncBlockCache.CleanupBlockList: Head of the cleanup list (points to the first SyncBlock in the chain)
_fields.SyncBlockCache.FreeSyncTableIndex: One past the highest sync table entry index allocated
_fields.SyncTableEntry.Object: Pointer to the object associated with a sync table entry
_fields.SyncTableEntry.Size: Size in bytes of each entry in the sync table
_fields.SyncTableEntry.SyncBlock: Pointer to the sync block for a sync table entry
_fields.System.Collections.Generic.List`1._items: Backing array containing the list elements
_fields.System.Collections.Generic.List`1._size: Number of elements currently stored in the list
_fields.System.Diagnostics.EditAndContinueHelper: Holds the per-field storage for an EnC-added instance field.
_fields.System.Runtime.CompilerServices.Conditio: Active container that owns the table's buckets and entries
Array of entry indexes at the head of each hash bucket; -1 denotes an empty bucket
Array containing the table's dependent handles and hash-chain links
Dependent handle that weakly references the key and conditionally keeps the value alive
Cached nonnegative identity hash code of the entry's key; -1 denotes a removed entry
Index of the next entry in the hash bucket chain, or -1 for the end
_fields.System.Runtime.InteropServices.Objective: Pointer to the tagged memory block associated with the tracked Objective-C object
_fields.System.Threading.Lock._owningThreadId: Managed thread ID of the thread that currently owns the lock
_fields.System.Threading.Lock._recursionCount: Number of recursive acquisitions beyond the initial lock acquisition
_fields.System.Threading.Lock._state: Bitfield containing lock ownership, waiter, spinner, and wake-up state
_fields.SystemDomain.GlobalLoaderAllocator: Pointer to the global loader allocator
_fields.SystemVEightByteRegistersInfo.EightByteC: Register classification of the first eightbyte
Register classification of the second eightbyte
_fields.SystemVEightByteRegistersInfo.EightByteS: Byte size of the first eightbyte
Byte size of the second eightbyte
_fields.SystemVEightByteRegistersInfo.NumEightBy: Number of eightbyte slots used to pass the value type in registers (0 if not passed in registers)
_fields.TableSegment.RgTail: Tail block index per handle type
_fields.TableSegment.RgUserData: Auxiliary per-block metadata (e.g. secondary handle blocks)
_fields.TailCallFrame.CalleeSavedRegisters: Address of the embedded nonvolatile-register values saved in the tailcall frame
_fields.TailCallFrame.ReturnAddress: Return address saved in the tailcall frame
_fields.TailCallFrame.Size: Size in bytes of the tailcall frame, used to restore the caller's stack pointer
_fields.ThisPtrRetBufPrecodeData.MethodDesc: pointer to the MethodDesc associated with the ThisPtrRetBufPrecode (Version 2 only)
_fields.Thread.CachedStackBase: Pointer to the base of the stack
_fields.Thread.CachedStackLimit: Pointer to the limit of the stack
_fields.Thread.CurrentCustomDebuggerNotification: Handle to the current custom debugger notification object
_fields.Thread.DebuggerControlledThreadState: Thread state flags controlled by the debugger
_fields.Thread.DebuggerFilterContext: Pointer to the debugger filter context for the thread
_fields.Thread.ExposedObject: Handle to the managed `Thread` object exposed to the debugger
_fields.Thread.GCFrame: Pointer to the head of the thread's GCFrame chain.
_fields.Thread.InteropDebuggingHijacked: Whether the thread has been hijacked for interop debugging
_fields.Thread.LastThrownObject: Handle to last thrown exception object
_fields.Thread.LastThrownObjectIsUnhandled: Whether `LastThrownObject` should be treated as unhandled
_fields.Thread.PreemptiveGCDisabled: Flag indicating if preemptive GC is disabled
_fields.Thread.ThreadHandle: OS thread handle (optional, Windows only; readers should expect `TargetPointer.Null` on non-Windows targets)
_fields.Thread.ThreadLocalDataPtr: Pointer to thread local data structure
_fields.Thread.UEWatsonBucketTrackerBuckets: Pointer to thread Watson buckets data (optional, Windows only)
_fields.ThreadLocalData.CollectibleTlsArrayData: Pointer to collectible TLS array data
_fields.ThreadLocalData.CollectibleTlsDataCount: Count of collectible TLS data entries
_fields.ThreadLocalData.InFlightData: Pointer to in-flight TLS data for fields being initialized
_fields.ThreadLocalData.NonCollectibleTlsArrayDa: Pointer to non-collectible TLS array data
_fields.ThreadLocalData.NonCollectibleTlsDataCou: Count of non-collectible TLS data entries
_fields.ThreadStaticsInfo.GCTlsIndex: Pointer to GC thread local storage index
_fields.ThreadStaticsInfo.NonGCTlsIndex: Pointer to non-GC thread local storage index
_fields.ThreadStaticsInfo.Size: Size in bytes of the thread-statics information stored immediately before MethodTable auxiliary data
_fields.ThreadStore.FirstThreadLink: Pointer to first thread in the linked list
_fields.ThreadStressLog.ChunkListHead: Pointer to the head of the chunk list
_fields.ThreadStressLog.ChunkListTail: Pointer to the tail of the chunk list
_fields.ThreadStressLog.CurrentPtr: Pointer to the most recently written message
_fields.ThreadStressLog.CurrentWriteChunk: Pointer to the chunk currently being written to
_fields.ThreadStressLog.Next: Pointer to the next thread-specific log
_fields.ThreadStressLog.WriteHasWrapped: Whether the write pointer is writing to previously used chunks
_fields.TLSIndex.TLSIndexRawIndex: Raw index value containing type and offset
_fields.TransitionBlock.ArgumentRegisters: Byte offset of the argument registers area within the TransitionBlock
_fields.TransitionBlock.CalleeSavedRegisters: Platform specific CalleeSavedRegisters struct associated with the TransitionBlock
_fields.TransitionBlock.FirstGCRefMapSlot: Byte offset where GCRefMap slot enumeration begins. ARM64: RetBuffArgReg offset; others: ArgumentRegisters offset
_fields.TransitionBlock.ReturnAddress: Return address associated with the TransitionBlock
_fields.TransitionBlock.Size: Size in bytes of the transition block, used to restore the caller's stack pointer
_fields.TypedByRef.Data: Managed pointer (the byref) stored in a System.TypedReference value
_fields.TypedByRef.Type: Raw TypeHandle pointer of the referent type
_fields.type.Size: Size in bytes of each SHash table entry
_fields.type.TableSize: Number of entries in the table
_fields.TypeDesc.TypeAndFlags: The lower 8 bits are the CorElementType of the TypeDesc, the upper 24 bits are reserved for flags
_fields.TypeVarTypeDesc.Module: Pointer to module which defines the type variable
_fields.UnorderedArrayBase.Count: Number of valid entries currently stored in the array.
_fields.UnorderedArrayBase.Table: Pointer to the backing storage holding the array's entries.
_fields.UnwindInfo.FunctionLength: Length of the associated function in bytes. Only exists on some platforms
_fields.VASigCookie.SignatureLength: Length in bytes of the raw vararg signature blob.
_fields.VASigCookie.SignaturePointer: Target address of the raw vararg signature blob.
_fields.VASigCookie.SizeOfArgs: Total size in bytes of the varargs argument area; used on x86 to locate the argument base
_fields.VirtualCallStubManager.CacheEntryHeap: Cache-entry heap (optional, present with virtual stub dispatch)
_fields.WebcilHeader.CoffSections: Number of COFF section headers in the Webcil image
_fields.WebcilHeader.VersionMajor: Major version of the Webcil file format
_fields.WebcilSectionHeader.PointerToRawData: File offset of the section's raw data
_fields.WebcilSectionHeader.SizeOfRawData: Size of the section's raw data in the file
_fields.WebcilSectionHeader.VirtualAddress: Relative virtual address of the section
_fields.WebcilSectionHeader.VirtualSize: Size of the section in virtual memory

_globals.<FrameType>Identifier: Per-frame-type sentinel address used to identify and classify runtime frames
_globals.AppDomain: Pointer to the global application domain
_globals.ArrayBaseSize: The base size of an array object; used to compute multidimensional array rank from MethodTable::BaseSize
_globals.ArrayBoundsZero: Known value for a single-dimensional, zero-lower-bound array
_globals.AuxiliarySymbolCount: Pointer to the count of populated entries in the array
_globals.AuxiliarySymbols: Pointer to an array of AuxiliarySymbolInfo entries
_globals.BlockInvalid: Sentinel value indicating an invalid handle block index
_globals.BookkeepingStart: Pointer to the bookkeeping start address
_globals.CanonMethodTable: A pointer to the address of the canonical MethodTable used for shared generics (System.__Canon)
_globals.CCWNumInterfaces: Number of vtable pointer slots in each ComCallWrapper (NumVtablePtrs = 5)
_globals.CCWThisMask: Alignment mask applied to a standard CCW IP to recover the ComCallWrapper pointer
_globals.CFinalizeFillPointersLength: The number of elements in the CFinalize::FillPointers array
_globals.CLRJitAttachState: Pointer to the CLR JIT attach state flags
_globals.CompactReasonsLength: The number of elements in the CompactReasons array
_globals.ComWrappers.s_allManagedObjectWrapperTab: Address of the ComWrappers managed static table that maps managed objects to their wrappers
_globals.ComWrappers.s_nativeObjectWrapperTable: Address of the ComWrappers managed static table that maps native objects to their wrappers
_globals.ComWrappersVtablePtrs: Pointer to struct containing ComWrappers-related function pointers
_globals.ContinuationMethodTable: A pointer to the address of the base Continuation MethodTable, or null if no continuations have been created
_globals.ContinuationSingletonEEClass: A pointer to the address of the singleton EEClass shared by continuation subtypes that have no metadata of their own
_globals.CoreLib: Pointer to the CoreLibBinder data containing well-known core library type handles
_globals.CountFreeRegionKinds: Number of free region kinds (basic, large, huge)
_globals.CurrentGCState: c_gc_state enum value. Only available when GCIdentifiers contains background.
_globals.DebugDestroyedHandleValue: Sentinel handle value used for destroyed handles
_globals.Debugger: Address of the pointer to the Debugger instance (&g_pDebugger)
_globals.DispatchThisPtrMask: Used to mask low bits of CCW pointer to the nearest valid address from which to read a managed object wrapper
_globals.DynamicAdaptationMode: GC heap dynamic adaptation mode. Only available when GCIdentifiers contains dynamic_heap.
_globals.EEJitManagerAddress: Address of the global pointer to the EEJitManager instance (read a TargetPointer from this address to obtain the instance address)
_globals.ExceptionMethodTable: A pointer to the address of the System.Exception MethodTable (g_pExceptionClass)
_globals.ExpandMechanismsLength: The number of elements in the ExpandMechanisms array
_globals.FeatureCOMInterop: Present (nonzero) when COM interop is enabled
_globals.FeatureEHFunclets: 1 if EH funclets are enabled, 0 otherwise
_globals.FeatureJavaMarshal: Present (nonzero) when Java marshalling is enabled
_globals.FeatureObjCMarshal: Present (nonzero) when Objective-C marshalling is enabled
_globals.FeatureOnStackReplacement: Present (nonzero) when on-stack replacement is enabled
_globals.FeaturePortableEntrypoints: Present (nonzero) when portable entrypoints are enabled
_globals.FieldOffsetBigRVA: Sentinel value of FieldDesc::DWord2 indicating the field is an RVA static whose offset is too large to encode in the bitfield; the real offset must be read from the field's metadata (FieldDefinition.GetRelativeVirtualAddress).
_globals.FieldOffsetDynamicRVA: Sentinel FieldDesc offset for an EnC-added RVA field whose enclosing type is not yet loaded
_globals.FieldOffsetNewEnc: Sentinel offset value stored in FieldDesc::DWord2 for added fields whose storage has not yet been allocated.
_globals.FreeObjectMethodTable: A pointer to the address of a MethodTable used by the GC to indicate reclaimed memory
_globals.GCGlobalMechanisms: Pointer to counters recording use of global GC mechanisms
_globals.GCHeapAllocAllocated: Highest address allocated by Alloc (in workstation builds)
_globals.GCHeapBackgroundMaxSavedAddr: Background saved highest address (in workstation builds with background GC)
_globals.GCHeapBackgroundMinSavedAddr: Background saved lowest address (in workstation builds with background GC)
_globals.GCHeapCardTable: Pointer to the static heap's bookkeeping GC data structure (in workstation builds)
_globals.GCHeapCompactReasons: Data array stored per heap (in workstation builds)
_globals.GCHeapEphemeralHeapSegment: Pointer to an ephemeral heap segment (in workstation builds)
_globals.GCHeapExpandMechanisms: Data array stored per heap (in workstation builds)
_globals.GCHeapFinalizeQueue: Pointer to the static heap's CFinalize data structure (in workstation builds)
_globals.GCHeapFreeableSohSegment: Pointer to the freeable SOH segment head (workstation builds)
_globals.GCHeapFreeableUohSegment: Pointer to the freeable UOH segment head (workstation builds)
_globals.GCHeapFreeRegions: Pointer to the free regions array (workstation builds)
_globals.GCHeapGenerationTable: Pointer to the start of an array containing "TotalGenerationCount" Generation structures (in workstation builds)
_globals.GCHeapHeapAnalyzeSuccess: Boolean indicating if heap analyze succeeded (in workstation builds)
_globals.GCHeapInterestingData: Data array stored per heap (in workstation builds)
_globals.GCHeapInterestingMechanismBits: Data array stored per heap (in workstation builds)
_globals.GCHeapInternalRootArray: Data array stored per heap (in workstation builds)
_globals.GCHeapMarkArray: Pointer to the static heap's MarkArray (in workstation builds with background GC)
_globals.GCHeapNextSweepObj: Pointer to the static heap's NextSweepObj (in workstation builds with background GC)
_globals.GCHeapOomData: OOM related data in a struct (in workstation builds)
_globals.GCHeapSavedSweepEphemeralSeg: Pointer to the static heap's saved sweep ephemeral segment (in workstation builds with segment and background GC)
_globals.GCHeapSavedSweepEphemeralStart: Start of the static heap's sweep ephemeral segment (in workstation builds with segment and background GC)
_globals.GCHighestAddress: Highest GC address as recorded by the VM/GC interface
_globals.GCIdentifiers: CSV string containing identifiers of the GC. Current values are "server", "workstation", "regions", and "segments"
_globals.GCLowestAddress: Lowest GC address as recorded by the VM/GC interface
_globals.GcNotificationFlags: Global flag for storing GC notification data
_globals.GlobalFreeHugeRegions: Pointer to the global free huge region list
_globals.GlobalMechanismsLength: Number of counters in the global GC mechanisms array
_globals.GlobalRegionsToDecommit: Pointer to the global regions-to-decommit array
_globals.HandleBlocksPerSegment: Number of blocks in each TableSegment
_globals.HandleMaxInternalTypes: Number of handle types (length of TableSegment.RgTail)
_globals.HandleSegmentSize: Size of a handle table segment
_globals.HandlesPerBlock: Number of handles in each handle block
_globals.HandleTableMap: Pointer to the head of the handle table map linked list
_globals.HashMapSlotsPerBucket: Number of slots in each bucket of a `HashMap`
_globals.HashMapValueMask: Bitmask used when storing values in a `HashMap`
_globals.Heaps: Pointer to an array of pointers to heaps
_globals.InitialHandleTableArraySize: Number of bucket entries in each HandleTableMap
_globals.InterestingDataLength: The number of elements in the InterestingData array
_globals.InterestingMechanismBitsLength: The number of elements in the InterestingMechanismBits array
_globals.JITNotificationTable: Pointer to the g_pNotificationTable array of JITNotification entries
_globals.JITNotificationTableSize: Maximum number of entries in the notification table (excluding bookkeeping)
_globals.MaxGeneration: Pointer to the maximum generation number (uint)
_globals.MaxHijackFunctions: Number of entries in the hijack function array.
_globals.MethodDescAlignment: MethodDescChunk trailing data is allocated in multiples of this constant.  The size (in bytes) of each MethodDesc (or subclass) instance is a multiple of this constant.
_globals.MethodDescTokenRemainderBitCount: Number of bits in the token remainder in MethodDesc
_globals.MiniMetaDataBuffAddress: Identify where the mini metadata stream exists
_globals.MiniMetaDataBuffMaxSize: Identify where the size of the mini metadata stream
_globals.MulticastDelegateMethodTable: A pointer to the address of the System.MulticastDelegate MethodTable (g_pMulticastDelegateClass)
_globals.NumberOfTlsOffsetsNotUsedInNoncollectibl: Number of unused slots in the non-collectible TLS array
_globals.NumHeaps: Pointer to the number of heaps for server GC (int)
_globals.ObjectArrayMethodTable: A pointer to the address of the object[] MethodTable (g_pPredefinedArrayTypes[ELEMENT_TYPE_OBJECT])
_globals.ObjectiveCMarshal.s_objects: Address of ObjectiveCMarshal.s_objects, the ConditionalWeakTable mapping tracked objects to tracking information
_globals.ObjectMethodTable: Address of the global variable holding the System.Object MethodTable pointer
_globals.ObjectToMethodTableUnmask: Bits to clear when converting an object header value to a method table address
_globals.PtrArrayOffsetToDataArray: Offset from a pointer-array object to its enclosed data array
_globals.RCWCleanupList: Pointer to the global g_pRCWCleanupList instance
_globals.RCWInterfaceCacheSize: Number of entries in the inline interface entry cache (INTERFACE_ENTRY_CACHE_SIZE)
_globals.RecommendedReaderVersion: Incremented when an update to the latest contracts is recommended
_globals.StaticsPointerMask: For masking out a bit of DynamicStaticsInfo pointer fields
_globals.StressLogChunkSize: Size of a stress log chunk
_globals.StressLogEnabled: Whether the stress log is enabled
_globals.StressLogHasModuleTable: Whether the stress log module table is present
_globals.StressLogMaxMessageSize: Maximum size of a stress log message
_globals.StressLogMaxModules: Maximum number of module descriptors in the stress log module table
_globals.StressLogModuleTable: Pointer to the stress log module descriptor table
_globals.StressLogValidChunkSig: Signature value stored in both markers of a valid stress log chunk
_globals.StringMethodTable: Pointer to the method table for `System.String`
_globals.StructureInvalidCount: Pointer to the count of invalid GC structures (int)
_globals.StubCodeBlockLast: Maximum sentinel code header value indentifying a stub code block
_globals.SyncBlockCache: Pointer to the runtime sync block cache
_globals.SyncBlockHashCodeMask: Mask for extracting the hash code from the sync block value
_globals.SyncBlockIndexMask: Mask for extracting the sync block index
_globals.SyncBlockIsHashCode: Bit indicating that the remaining sync block value contains a hash code
_globals.SyncBlockIsHashOrSyncBlockIndex: Bit indicating that the sync block value contains a hash code or sync block index
_globals.SyncBlockMaskLockRecursionLevel: Mask for extracting recursion level from SyncBlock.ThinLock
_globals.SyncBlockMaskLockThreadId: Mask for extracting thread id from SyncBlock.ThinLock
_globals.SyncBlockRecursionLevelShift: Shift value for SyncBlock.ThinLock recursion level
_globals.SyncTableEntries: Pointer to the sync table entries array
